overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a rain-soaked elevated highway at night through a dystopian cityscape. The vehicle weaves through moderate traffic while neon advertisements and holographic billboards illuminate the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk highway with neon advertising

events.description: vehicle accelerates from 60 km/h to 80 km/h while following yellow car ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the rain-slicked highway, maintaining position behind a yellow vehicle while neon billboards flash on both sides

notable_agents.action: yellow compact car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall concrete noise barriers with metal fencing running parallel to the highway
large glowing advertisement panels displaying colorful cyberpunk branding and animated graphics
metal truss structures supporting directional signage spanning across the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a vehicle driving on a rain-soaked elevated highway at night. Neon holographic billboards illuminate the right side while concrete barriers line both sides of the multi-lane road. The vehicle accelerates while following a yellow compact car ahead, with artificial lighting from street lamps and advertisements reflecting off the wet asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with dense neon signage and moderate traffic

events.description: vehicle decelerates significantly from 70 km/h to 40 km/h due to traffic congestion ahead
driver changes lanes to the right to overtake slower moving traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic, slowing down and changing lanes to maneuver around slower vehicles while maintaining control on the wet surface

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan maintaining position in the left lane, occasionally braking

entered.detail: tall vertical structures displaying rotating holographic product advertisements with purple and orange glow

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the highway, now surrounded by denser traffic requiring speed adjustments and lane changes. Holographic advertisement towers appear on the right side, replacing the earlier billboards. The driver maneuvers around slower vehicles while the rain continues to streak across the windshield, and the concrete barriers remain a constant presence on both sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-speed highway section with overpasses and industrial vehicles

events.description: vehicle accelerates rapidly to 90 km/h as the road opens up with fewer vehicles ahead
large military transport truck enters the right lane from an on-ramp, moving slowly

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speeds while passing under overpasses, overtaking slower vehicles including a large military transport truck on the right

notable_agents.action: large military transport truck with camouflage pattern driving slowly in the right lane, carrying cargo containers

entered.detail: concrete and steel highway overpass creating partial cover overhead with support pillars visible
distant structure with glowing lights indicating the approach to a toll collection point

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a high-speed section of the highway, accelerating under overpass structures that create a semi-covered environment. A large military transport truck appears in the right lane, moving significantly slower than the traffic flow. In the distance, the illuminated structure of a toll plaza becomes visible, signaling an upcoming transition point on the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll plaza approach with lane markings and collection booths

events.description: highway narrows and transitions into organized toll plaza lanes with overhead gantries

agents.ego_description: decelerating as the vehicle approaches the toll plaza, navigating into the designated payment lanes while observing the booth structures ahead

entered.detail: large overhead canopy covering the toll collection area with multiple booth lanes visible underneath
large industrial warehouse building with 'REAL WATER' signage illuminated on the facade
painted lane markings and barriers directing traffic into specific toll payment channels

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle approaching a toll plaza, with the highway narrowing into designated lanes. An industrial building with 'REAL WATER' signage is visible on the left, while the toll booth canopy structure dominates the center of the frame ahead. The vehicle decelerates as it prepares to enter the toll collection area, with lane markings guiding the path forward and the military truck no longer visible in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transitions from an open neon-lit corridor into a constrained industrial toll plaza. It begins with the vehicle accelerating behind a yellow compact car, where holographic billboards and street lamps cast vibrant reflections across the wet asphalt. As the traffic densifies, the camera maneuvers through lane changes past towering holographic advertisements while rain streaks across the windshield. The scene then shifts into a high-speed stretch under heavy overpass structures, passing a slow-moving military transport truck as a distant toll plaza comes into view. Finally, the highway narrows past an industrial building with REAL WATER signage, with the vehicle decelerating as it enters the looming canopy of the toll collection area.
